_comment: Cut-in/bark lines. Categories: weak (struck a weakness), kill, hurt (dropped below 35%), probe (she scanned), switch_in, victory, map (idle flavor on the act map), map_low (her HP < 35% on the map). Expression per category: weak/kill/victory=confident or fierce, hurt=strained, probe/map=confident.

weak: The armor remembers where it cracked.
map: I dislike how quiet it is.

weak: Saw that gap a mile away.
hurt: I felt that one in my teeth...
probe: Lemme see your hand. Knew it — bluffing.
switch_in: Tag me in, tag me in!
map: I vote whichever path has loot.
Race you to the next fight.

probe: I smell a trick on this one.
map: Pick the path with the elite. Trust me.
map_low: It's a flesh wound. It's ALL flesh wounds.

kill: The sea takes back its own.
probe: I see what you hide beneath.
The water remembers your true shape.
map: Listen... the bronze one is breathing.
map_low: My strength ebbs... it will return.
